session.user: Run `uv run pytest tests/commands/pr/ -v` and report results. Do NOT fix any errors - just report them.
session.assistant: I'll run the pytest command for the PR commands tests and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run pytest tests for PR commands with verbose output

session.tool_result:
